label: Compound ID
definition: Unique identifier for the household compound

label: Cluster ID
definition: Cluster identifier; the unit of randomization

label: Randomization block
definition: Randomization block number (1-90); each block contains one household from each of the 7 treatment arms

label: Treatment arm
definition: Randomized treatment assignment: Control / Water / Sanitation / Handwashing / WSH (Water+Sanitation+Handwashing) / Nutrition / Nutrition+WSH

label: Sex
definition: Sex of the index child (female or male)

label: Child age (years)
definition: Age of the index child at time of STH measurement in years (continuous)

label: Mother's age (years)
definition: Age of the child's mother at baseline enrollment in years

label: Mother's education
definition: Mother's highest level of education: No education / Primary (1-5 years) / Secondary (more than 5 years)

label: Household wealth
definition: Household wealth index based on asset ownership dichotomized into two quantiles: Lower wealth or Higher wealth

label: Any STH infection
definition: Any soil-transmitted helminth infection detected by Kato-Katz (Ascaris or Trichuris or hookworm): Negative or Positive

label: Ascaris infection
definition: Ascaris lumbricoides infection detected by Kato-Katz stool examination: Negative or Positive

label: Trichuris infection
definition: Trichuris trichiura infection detected by Kato-Katz stool examination: Negative or Positive

label: Hookworm infection
definition: Hookworm infection detected by Kato-Katz stool examination: Negative or Positive

label: Ascaris egg count (EPG)
definition: Ascaris lumbricoides eggs per gram of stool by Kato-Katz; 0 indicates no infection

label: Hookworm egg count (EPG)
definition: Hookworm eggs per gram of stool by Kato-Katz; 0 indicates no infection

label: Trichuris egg count (EPG)
definition: Trichuris trichiura eggs per gram of stool by Kato-Katz; 0 indicates no infection

label: Tubewell water source
definition: Primary drinking water source is a shallow tubewell (Yes or No)

label: Water storage
definition: Household stores drinking water in a container (Yes or No)

label: Water treatment
definition: Household reported treating drinking water today or yesterday (e.g. boiling or chlorination) (Yes or No)

label: Latrine ownership
definition: Household owns their latrine and does not share it with other households (Yes or No)

label: Latrine slab
definition: Latrine has a concrete slab covering the pit (Yes or No)

label: Latrine cleanliness
definition: Feces observed on the latrine slab or floor during field visit: Feces present or No feces present

label: Human feces in compound
definition: Human feces observed in the house or compound during field visit (Yes or No)

label: Geophagia
definition: Child ate any dirt or soil in the past 7 days as reported by caregiver (Yes or No)

label: Wearing shoes
definition: Child was observed wearing shoes at the time of the field visit (Yes or No)
